subject: fix(mobile): 20 mobile UX improvements across 12 components
body:
CRITICAL: Touch targets enlarged to meet 44px minimum —
TransactionEditModal close button (40x40px), tag removal buttons
(20x20px), ToastNotification dismiss (32x32px). Modal padding
responsive for small phones.

MEDIUM: Input fields use text-base (16px) globally to prevent iOS
Safari auto-zoom on focus. MetricCard labels, table headers,
ClassificationBadge upgraded from text-xs. Menu dropdown max-width
clamped. Menu items get 44px min-height. HelpDrawer responsive width.
Autocomplete dropdown renders upward to avoid modal overflow clip.
Toast respects safe-area-inset-bottom.

LOW: BottomSheet swipe-to-close gesture on drag handle (80px
threshold). Pagination buttons enlarged. InstallPrompt stacks
vertically on narrow screens.

Tags: mobile, ux, touch-targets, a11y, pwa
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: minor
